name: Locomotion R-Genex
name_jp: レアル・ジェネクス・クロキシアン
desc:
1 "Genex" Tuner + 1 or more non-Tuner DARK monsters
When this card is Synchro Summoned, take control of the face-up monster your opponent controls with the highest Level. (If it's a tie, you get to choose.)
mnst_eff:
1 "Genex" Tuner + 1 or more non-Tuner DARK monsters
When this card is Synchro Summoned, take control of the face-up monster your opponent controls with the highest Level. (If it's a tie, you get to choose.)
eff:
1 "Genex" Tuner + 1 or more non-Tuner DARK monsters
When this card is Synchro Summoned, take control of the face-up monster your opponent controls with the highest Level. (If it's a tie, you get to choose.)

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
summoning: Requires archetype specific Tuner Synchro Materials
Requires Attribute specific non-Tuner Synchro Materials
